title: MikroTik S53UG+5HaxD2HaxD-TC&RG650E-EU, Chateau 5G R17 ax
description: Chateau 5G ax R17 combines elegant design, powerful dual-band Wi-Fi 6 coverage, and extensive capabilities powered by RouterOS v7 . Under the hood, a major upgrade has been made â a new 5G Release 17-compatible modem brings support for the latest mobile technologies, including advanced carrier aggregation. On the back, youâll find a USB port, four 1Gbps Ethernet ports and one 2.5G Ethernet port The result is faster connectivity , more stable signal , and better responsiveness , even in areas with weaker coverage. Wherever you are, Chateau will always find the optimal signal Chateau features a built-in eSIM fully compatible with: MikroTik Connectivity (pre-activated data plans) Third-party eSIMs (mobile operator eSIM profiles) Multiple eSIM profiles (easy to add, switch, or store) With four built-in LTE/5G antennas and two external dual-chain Wi-Fi 6 antennas , Chateau delivers excellent performance for both downloads and uploads even in high-density environments: Smart carrier aggregation with wide FDD and TDD band support Strong signal reception thanks to 4x4 MIMO technology Wi-Fi coverage suitable for all types of homes, including multi-story buildings The router runs on RouterOS v7 , an industrial-grade operating system used by ISPs and network admins worldwide â yet its intuitive interface makes it accessible for everyday users. A dedicated mobile app for iOS and Android is also available to simplify setup Set up a secure VPN , optimize streaming, limit bandwidth, create VLANs , block websites, or receive SMS alerts when limits are exceeded â all without hidden…
